decks.notes: This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board by using a combination of spells and abilities. It utilizes cards like Impractical Joke and Fire Magic to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also building up resources with cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Tablet of Discovery. With a mix of burn spells and card advantage engines, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and slowly chip away at their life total. The creatures in the deck, like Gran-Gran and Questing Druid, provide additional support and can help close out the game when needed.

The main idea of this Izzet Control deck is to slow down the opponent's actions by countering their spells and removing their threats, while simultaneously drawing cards and generating value through card advantage. The deck focuses on controlling the board through spells such as Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson, while also utilizing card-draw spells like Accumulate Wisdom and Jeskai Revelation to maintain a full hand and stay ahead in resources. Additionally, the deck includes powerful finishers like Gran-Gran and Iroh's Demonstration to close out the game once the opponent has been overwhelmed.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a combination of powerful spells and card advantage to dominate the game. By continuously drawing cards, countering spells, and controlling the board with removal, it aims to outvalue and outlast opponents. With a mix of burn spells, card draw engines, and versatile threats like Thor, God of Thunder, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and eventually overwhelm the opponent with powerful plays. By leveraging its versatility and card advantage, the deck seeks to maintain control throughout the match and secure a victory.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board through a combination of counter spells, removal, and bounce effects. It utilizes cards like Burst Lightning, Spell Pierce, and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also using Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock to control the board. The deck also includes card draw and selection with Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Prismari Charm to ensure consistency. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and dominate the game with powerful late-game threats like Hearth Elemental and Traumatic Critique.

The key focus of this deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of countering spells, drawing cards, and generating mana advantage. Using powerful spells such as Accumulate Wisdom and Combustion Technique, along with support from Thor, God of Thunder and Gran-Gran, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and gradually pull ahead in resources. Additionally, card advantage and selection from Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation help to ensure that the player can consistently access their key cards and maintain board presence.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. By utilizing a mix of instants, creatures, and enchantments, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and control the pace of the game. With cards like Opt, Prismari Charm, and Burst Lightning providing card advantage and removal options, along with counterspells like Spell Snare and Traumatic Critique, this deck excels at controlling the battlefield and outsmarting the opponent to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with early aggression by playing efficient and powerful creatures in Mono Green. The deck aims to flood the board with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, while also benefiting from ramp and mana acceleration with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage. The deck also includes cards like Snakeskin Veil and Meltstrider's Resolve to protect and buff your creatures, ensuring they can continue to apply pressure. Additionally, the deck includes powerful finishers like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Earthbender Ascension to seal the deal.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells. The deck uses a combination of card draw, removal spells, and graveyard manipulation to set up the combo efficiently. Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation provide strong reanimation targets, while cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Bitter Triumph help control the board and protect the combo. Overall, the deck focuses on quickly assembling the pieces needed to reanimate big threats and overwhelm the opponent.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to play powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker. Utilizing combat tricks like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip to clear the way for aggressive attacks, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and buffs. Multiversal Passage allows for color fixing while Ba Sing Se provides additional value. The inclusion of Ouroboroid and Jennifer Walters offer resilience and card advantage, making this deck a formidable force in the Standard 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures and land destruction. By ramping up with Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, you can quickly play out powerful early creatures like Badgermole Cub and Icetill Explorer. Earthbender Ascension and Demolition Field can be used to disrupt the opponent's lands, while cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Mightform Harmonizer enhance your creatures to push for a fast win. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent from the beginning and maintain that pressure until victory.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using counterspells and removal spells to control the board while drawing cards and generating card advantage. By disrupting the opponent's game plan and managing threats efficiently, the deck aims to maintain control of the game until it can establish a strong board presence with powerful finishers like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab. Utilizing a mix of spells to answer various threats and generate value, this deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through careful resource management and strategic decision-making.

The key concept of the Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with low-cost creatures and then buff them up with spells like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip. Utilizing creatures like Badgermole Cub and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on while also providing some resilience with cards like Jennifer Walters and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. The inclusion of Brightglass Gearhulk adds a powerful finisher to the deck, allowing for potential big swings in the late game.

This deck focuses on fast-paced aggression with a mix of blue and red spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain tempo. Boomerang Basics and Colorstorm Stallion provide early pressure, while Eddymurk Crab and Flow State offer control options. Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent serve as finishers, with Burst Lightning for direct damage. The deck also features evasion with Hydro-Man, Fluid Felon and Secret Identity. By combining efficient creatures and versatile spells, this UR Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By efficiently utilizing cards like Vibrant Outburst, Burst Lightning, and Ojer Axonil, Deepest Might, you can quickly deal damage to your opponent and control the board. The creatures in the deck, such as Magebane Lizard and Sunspine Lynx, are designed to apply pressure and force your opponent to react defensively. With a mix of burn spells and aggressive creatures, you can maintain a fast-paced and threatening presence on the battlefield.

The deck focuses on utilizing graveyard interaction to quickly reanimate powerful creatures or spells. It makes use of cards that can fill the graveyard, search for specific pieces, and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The key strategy is to set up a combo that can bring back high impact creatures or cards from the graveyard, overwhelming the opponent with their power and versatility. The deck also includes protection spells and card draw to ensure consistency and resilience in executing the reanimation strategy.

The deck focuses on using a combination of burn spells, counterspells, and card draw to control the game and outmaneuver the opponent. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide additional control elements, while Hearth Elemental and Prismari Charm offer versatility in dealing with threats. Flow State and Opt help with card selection and filtering, while Spell Snare and Impractical Joke disrupt the opponent's plans. Winternight Stories and Traumatic Critique provide additional removal options, while Multiversal Passage offers a way to fix mana. The deck aims to dominate the game through careful control and resource management.
